calendar.matters:
JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST-28-2013, 2:00 P.M.: JONATHAN BORNSTEIN, EXQ. FOR PLAINTIFF CITYWIDE PROPERTIES, INC.; JOSH SCHIEBER, ESQ. & NATHANIEL PLAYER, ESQ. OF THE EVICTION DEFENSE COLLABORATIVE FOR DEFENDANT JANA ROSE, ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

THE COURT HOLDS DISCUSSION WITH ALL COUNSEL AND RECEIVES PERMSSION TO HOLD AN ADDITIONAL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN THE CAUSE AND STILL REMAIN THE TRIAL JUDGE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS THEN PROCEED WITH THE COURT, ALL COUNSEL AND PARTIES. THE CAUSE SETTLES; THE CLERK CANCELS THE PANEL OF JURORS. ALL COUNSEL AND THE PARTIES ENTER INTO A STIPULATED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND SIGN SAME AND WHICH IS FILED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

JUDGE: HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 502).

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 502

CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Aug-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Citywide Properties, Inc. is present. Represented by Bill Cosgrove.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jana Rose is present.
Attorney Kristin Messer appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of AUG-26-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
